login.title: FloreoPOS
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Please login to your account.

shortcuts: Shortcuts: Ctrl+1 Dashboard, Ctrl+2 Billing, Ctrl+3 Inventory, Ctrl+4 Held, Ctrl+5 Customers, Ctrl+6 Suppliers, Ctrl+7 Operations, Ctrl+/ Focus scanner, F8 Hold, F9 Checkout

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Track sales, margins, and operational KPIs in one place.

billing.label: Billing
billing.title: Billing Workspace
billing.subtitle: Scan, add, and checkout quickly with cashier-focused controls.

inventory.label: Inventory
inventory.title: Inventory Control
inventory.subtitle: Monitor stock health, low-level alerts, and product availability.

held.label: Held Sales
held.title: Held Bills Queue
held.subtitle: Resume, complete, and manage pending draft bills safely.

customers.label: Customers
customers.title: Customer Ledger
customers.subtitle: Handle credit balances, settlement history, and payment updates.

suppliers.label: Suppliers
suppliers.title: Supplier Operations
suppliers.subtitle: Receive stock batches and track supplier payable settlements.

operations.label: Operations
operations.title: Operations Hub
operations.subtitle: Manage expenses and barcode label generation efficiently.

held.title: Held Sales
held.description: Resume or complete parked transactions quickly.

operations.title: Barcode & Expenses
operations.description: Manage barcode print queue and expense entries.
operations.barcodeQueueSubtitle: Prepare product labels for printing workflow.
operations.name: Name
operations.expensesSubtitle: Record operating expenses and review recent entries.

messages.barcodesSaved: No printer connected. Barcode PDF saved: {{path}}
messages.receiptPrinted: Checkout successful. Sale ID: {{saleId}}. Receipt printed on {{printer}}. PDF: {{path}}
messages.receiptSaved: Checkout successful. Sale ID: {{saleId}}. No printer connected, PDF saved: {{path}}
messages.heldPrinted: Held sale {{saleId}} completed. Receipt printed on {{printer}}. PDF: {{path}}
messages.heldSaved: Held sale {{saleId}} completed. No printer connected, PDF saved: {{path}}

billing.name: Name
billing.empty: Cart is empty. Add a product to start billing.
billing.checkoutReview: Review totals before finalizing the sale.

customers.title: Customer Ledger
customers.description: Track outstanding balances and settle customer dues.
customers.name: Name

suppliers.title: Supplier Ledger
suppliers.description: Receive stock, track batches, and settle payables.
suppliers.name: Name
suppliers.receiveBatchSubtitle: Single method receive: add each stock line, then finalize invoice and paid amount.
suppliers.barcodeMatched: Existing barcode found. Product details synced from inventory.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Browse and monitor product stock levels in real time.
inventory.addProductSubtitle: Single-row quick entry. Leave barcode blank to auto-generate as PS-10001, PS-10002, ...
inventory.barcodeMatched: Existing barcode found. Fields auto-filled, edit and click Update.
inventory.removeSubtitle: Remove by barcode or choose product name from dropdown.
inventory.superToolsSubtitle: Clear all product records and export/import inventory backups.
inventory.noMatch: No products match the current filters.

summary.danger: Clear all business data tables. This action cannot be undone.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.subtitle: The POS UI hit an unexpected error.
